chapter_title.en: Despair despite the possibility of forgiveness

text: ٨٧. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): عَجِبْتُ لِمَنْ يَقْنَطُ وَمَعَهُ الِاسْتِغْفَارُ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 87. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: I wonder about the man who loses hope despite the possibility of seeking forgiveness.
